title: If You're So Smart, Why Aren't You Happy?
author: Raj Raghunathan
subline: The link between success and unhappiness.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two bar charts: the left is the IQ distribution (a normal bell curve, weight 500, very high). The right is the happiness distribution (a long flat tail — most people are barely happy). One bar in the right chart is RED and inverted (pointing down) — the 'smart but unhappy' quadrant. -->
  <!-- Left chart: IQ / Success -->
  <g transform="translate(400 1300)">
    <line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="200" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="-200" y2="-400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="-200" y="-440" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SUCCESS / IQ</text>
    <!-- Bars rising in a bell shape -->
    <rect x="-180" y="-40" width="60" height="40" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <rect x="-120" y="-100" width="60" height="100" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <rect x="-60" y="-220" width="60" height="220" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <rect x="0" y="-340" width="60" height="340" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <rect x="60" y="-220" width="60" height="220" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <rect x="120" y="-100" width="60" height="100" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">DISTRIBUTION</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Right chart: HAPPINESS — left-skewed, mostly low, one tall red down-pointing bar (the 'smart + unhappy' cluster) -->
  <g transform="translate(1200 1300)">
    <line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="200" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="-200" y2="-400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="-200" y="-440" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">HAPPINESS</text>
    <!-- Mostly short bars, with one tall and one inverted -->
    <rect x="-180" y="-30" width="60" height="30" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <rect x="-120" y="-80" width="60" height="80" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <rect x="-60" y="-130" width="60" height="130" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <rect x="0" y="-90" width="60" height="90" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <rect x="60" y="-50" width="60" height="50" fill="#4c4c4c"/>
    <!-- The one tall + red bar — the smart but unhappy -->
    <rect x="120" y="-300" width="60" height="300" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.04em">DISTRIBUTION</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Center label: an X mark, the 'uncorrelated' thesis -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)">
    <line x1="-30" y1="-30" x2="30" y2="30" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="-30" y1="30" x2="30" y2="-30" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="0" y="-50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">NO CORRELATION</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Top label -->
  <text x="800" y="1620" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="400" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">FIG. 1 — THE SMART-UNHAPPY CLUSTER</text>
</svg>
rationale: Two bar charts side by side: left is a normal bell curve of IQ/success (the 'smart' axis); right is the happiness distribution, mostly flat with one tall RED bar (the 'smart + unhappy' cluster). Between them, a giant white X with the label 'NO CORRELATION' — the book's central thesis. 280px mixed-case title on top, weight 300. The visual question and answer is the same: being smart doesn't make you happy.
